subdomains.description: List of subdomain definitions for parallel row discovery

name.description: Short, descriptive name for this subdomain (e.g., 'AI Research Companies', 'Healthcare AI')

focus.description: Detailed description of what this subdomain targets and why it's a natural subdivision

search_queries.description: Specific search queries optimized for this subdomain

reasoning.description: Explanation of why these subdomains were chosen and how they provide good coverage without over-splitting
